subcodes.first_line: All the peoples hold their banquets at the time of peace, comfort and joy. They are merry and marry when in happiness and peace.
subcodes.first_line_orig: جمیع احزاب در زمان راحت و امان و سکون و اطمینان جشن شادمانی نمایند و بزم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @prayer for married couples, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
